s1.title: 1. Nature of Service
s1.body: This service provides reference reports that reinterpret traditional fortune analysis into probability-based statements. It does not offer absolute predictions or guaranteed outcomes.

s2.title: 2. User Obligations
s2.body: Automated abuse that undermines service stability, use for illegal purposes, and infringement of the rights of others are prohibited.

s3.title: 3. Limitation of Liability
s3.body: High-risk decisions involving medical, legal, investment, debt, or other critical matters must be made in consultation with qualified professionals. Reliance on this service as the sole basis for such decisions is not permitted.

s1.title: 1. Information Collected
s1.body: We process name, date of birth, time of birth (optional), gender, and calendar type solely for the purpose of generating reports.

s2.title: 2. Purpose of Use
s2.body: The collected information is used for personalized report generation, payment flow simulation, error analysis, and quality improvement.

s3.title: 3. Retention and Disposal
s3.body: Order and report data are stored on our servers and securely disposed of after the legally required retention period.

s1.title: 1. Refund Principles
s1.body: FortuneLab's paid Saju analysis reports are digital content. AI analysis is performed and the report is generated immediately upon payment.

s2.title: 2. Eligible for Refund
items: The report was not successfully generated after payment
Duplicate charges occurred due to a system error
The report has not been viewed within 24 hours of payment

s3.title: 3. Not Eligible for Refund
items: Dissatisfaction with report content after viewing (due to the nature of digital content)
More than 24 hours have passed since payment and the report has been viewed

s4.title: 4. Refund Procedure
s4.body: To request a refund, please contact us at contact@fortunelab.store using the email address provided at the time of payment. Refunds are processed within 3 business days.

s5.title: 5. Effective Date
s5.body: This refund policy is effective as of March 1, 2026.

s1.title: Interpretation Principles
s1.body: This service uses language centered on possibilities and tendencies, and avoids definitive predictive statements.

s2.title: Important Notice
s2.body: High-risk decisions involving medical, legal, investment, debt, or other critical matters must be accompanied by consultation with qualified professionals.

s3.title: User Responsibility
s3.body: Final judgment and responsibility for actions rest with the user. This service operates within the scope of providing reference information.
